channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-21 to 2026-07-27
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 1 INTERESTING, 6 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.0 ft @ 4.5 sec, wind 11 kt SSE, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.0 ft); period too short (4.5 sec); wind direction off (SSE). Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.7 ft). Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 69°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); wind direction off (N). Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 3 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); wind direction off (N). Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 5.1 sec, wind 11 kt NE, water 71°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (5.1 sec); wind direction off (NE). Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.5 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 71°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.5 ft); period too short (5.6 sec). Mon 2026-07-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 1 INTERESTING, 6 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.0 ft @ 4.5 sec, wind 11 kt SSE, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.0 ft); period too short (4.5 sec); wind direction off (SSE).
  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.7 ft).
  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 69°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); wind direction off (N).
  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 3 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); wind direction off (N).
  • Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 5.1 sec, wind 11 kt NE, water 71°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (5.1 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Sun 2026-07-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.5 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 71°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.5 ft); period too short (5.6 sec).
  • Mon 2026-07-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
